## Checklist

- [ ] Lint passes (`npm run lint`)
- [ ] Typecheck passes (`npm run typecheck`)
- [ ] Tests added/updated (`npm run test`)
- [ ] E2E updated if user-facing (`npm run e2e`)
- [ ] Docs updated (if applicable)
- [ ] No `any`, no `console.log`, no dead code
- [ ] All new env vars in `.env.example`
- [ ] All new i18n keys in both `en` and `vi` locales
